name: Contractor roster with one individual and one business contractor
description: Onboarded company shared across non-canary contractor list/edit lifecycle specs (contractor-business, contractor-mixed-roster, contractor-onboarding-edit-lifecycle). One individual + one business contractor cover both the business profile branch (Acme Consulting LLC) and the mixed-roster list assertion (Charlie Individual). The business contractor's name (Acme Consulting) is treated as a fixture key by the consuming specs — don't rename it without updating those specs. Specs that mutate state through onboarding (contractor-onboarding, contractor-cancel-lifecycle, contractor-business-create-lifecycle) intentionally use contractor-onboarding instead so this roster stays stable.
